# Cost 5 Heroes (MCGG S6)

Top tier: the legendaries, rarest pulls, game-deciding when starred.  9 heroes at this cost.

### Alpha  (id 28, cost 5)

- **Class:** Weapon Master  ·  **Faction:** Emberlord  ·  **Position:** Front-row
- **Skill (Force Swing):** Unleashes 2 sweeping slashes in a fan-shaped area in the front, dealing (+200% Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG to enemies. (DMG decreases for each enemy hit.) From the third cast onward, additionally releases 3 linear energy waves forward at different angles, each dealing (+110% Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG.
- **Physical Bonus (1/2/3 star):** 200% / 220% / 900%

### Badang  (id 77, cost 5)

- **Class:** Bruiser  ·  **Faction:** Dragoncaller  ·  **Position:** Front-row
- **Skill (Fist Crack):** Badang punches forward 8 Fist Wind(s), each dealing (+50% Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG to enemies (DMG decreases with the number of enemies hit).
